22:28 â November 18, 2022
Currency Ordering Updates
New Canadian bank notes can now be ordered in Cash Services. We updated procedures in the Currency Ordering Part to reflect this change. New bank notes continue to be available in Canadian currency only and are provided in bundles of 100 notes per denomination. Orders for new bank notes are subject to additional fees.
The form in ServiceNow (New Currency and Coin Order System) continues to be used for creating and deleting standing orders and for creating late orders. If you want to have new bank notes as part of a standing order, youâll continue making that selection on the ServiceNow form. Itâs no longer required to order a minimum of one block (ten bundles), since new notes will be provided in bundles of 100 notes per denomination, same as in Cash Services.
We also updated the procedures for making currency trace requests. Please see details below.

We removed references to ânew bank note ordersâ since these can now be submitted in Cash Services.
Section 13.6, Currency Trace Requests
We updated content to indicate that you need to contact your armoured car service if a currency order isnât received at the specified location. We provided details of the required information when making this request. You only need to contact Central 1 if your armoured car service canât locate the missing order.
